overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a foggy forest at night. The character encounters wild deer and elk before walking along a lantern-lit path toward a distant stone castle and wooden bridge.

events.description: character turns to observe the large elk walking past from left to right
character begins walking forward along the dirt path

agents.ego_description: standing still watching the elk move through the clearing, then turning to follow the path

notable_agents.action: large elk with prominent antlers walking past the character from left to right
deer standing on the mossy ridge in the foggy background

entered.detail: large male elk with prominent antlers walking close to the character
deer standing on the mossy ridge in the foggy background
large stone castle structure visible through the fog on the hillside
unpaved dirt trail winding through the forest
low stone wall covered in green moss lining the path

segments.scene_description: In a foggy forest clearing, the character stands observing a large elk with antlers walking past nearby. Deer are visible on the distant ridge, and a massive stone castle looms through the fog in the background. The character then turns and begins walking along the dirt path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the castle visible in the distance

entered.detail: lit stone lanterns lining the path providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character walks forward along the forest trail as the stone castle becomes more prominent through the fog. Lit stone lanterns appear along the right side of the path, and the wildlife moves out of view. The castle walls and towers are now clearly visible ahead.

events.description: character turns left following the winding path along the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path past multiple lanterns, turning toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: wooden bridge structure spanning across the foggy ravine ahead
steep cliff drop-off with fog filling the ravine below
tall rock wall beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed by dense trees as the character turns left along a cliff edge. Multiple stone lanterns line the route, and a wooden bridge becomes visible through the fog in the distance. The castle fades from view as the character follows the winding trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: path approaching wooden bridge over ravine

events.description: character slows down while approaching the wooden bridge entrance

agents.ego_description: walking carefully toward the wooden bridge at the path's end

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the wooden bridge spanning the foggy ravine. The path narrows between rock formations, and the bridge structure becomes the focal point ahead. Lanterns now line the left side as the character slows down near the bridge entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide forest clearing toward a secluded wooden bridge, shifting from an open encounter with wildlife to a narrow, lantern-lit trail. It begins with the character observing a large elk and distant deer in a foggy clearing, with a massive stone castle looming in the background before the camera turns to follow a dirt path. As the character advances, the castle towers become more prominent and lit stone lanterns emerge along the right side of the trail while the wildlife fades from view. The scene then shifts as the path winds left along a cliff edge, where the castle disappears behind dense trees and a wooden bridge begins to materialize through the mist. Finally, the route narrows between rock formations and the lanterns shift to the left side as the camera approaches the bridge spanning a foggy ravine.
